description: Project RNA velocity onto a 2D embedding (basis, e.g. umap) and render it to PNG. KIND selects the style: stream (velocity_embedding_stream), grid (velocity_embedding_grid), or arrows (velocity_embedding). Uses a non-interactive matplotlib backend.
rules: read-only input — writes a new velocity_embedding.png under record_store
requires a velocity graph and the embedding basis (e.g. obsm['X_umap'])
KIND in {stream, grid, arrows}; COLOR is an obs column (e.g. clusters/leiden)
usage: Set INPUT (velocity .h5ad). Optional: KIND (default stream), BASIS (default umap), COLOR (obs column). Output: velocity_embedding.png.
limitation: Requires scvelo + matplotlib installed and a 2D basis present; without scvelo the porter writes a {} placeholder velocity_embedding.png and still passes.
